summary: On March 7, 2026, Rubikon Center operators conducted strikes on Ukrainian Armed Forces personnel in Donbas and Krasny Liman, destroying 88 targets, while also engaging in FPV air defense against Ukrainian fixed-wing UAVs. The previous day, March 6, they destroyed 107 targets in the same regions, including Sumy. Rubikon’s air defense units have intercepted over 1,500 Ukrainian fixed-wing UAVs, with 75% of these being just 11 models, including the Leleka-100, Fury, and others. Meanwhile, Lasar’s Group NSU repelled mechanized assaults by the enemy on the Novopavlivka and Dobropillia directions in late January, successfully burning tanks with support from Azov Corps and the 9th Army Corps. Ukrainian forces are also advancing digital integration through the Mission Control project to centralize drone operations, while ZALA Lancet operators continue to strike group targets despite electronic warfare interference.
